INVOKE.COMMENT: get friend's challenge code corresponding to friend's challenge id

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

INVOKE.COMMENT: get challenge social rule data for friend's challenge code

MAP.COMMENT: output exists, continue with rest of the logic

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to get challenge social rule table data for Challenge code: %friendChallengeCode% and Effective date: %commContext/effRquestDate%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.NAME: %responseListSize%>0&&%results/status%=='200'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: api call is success, social interaction data exists

MAP.COMMENT: compare interaction effective dates to current date

BRANCH.COMMENT: check compared dated to identify current interaction

MAP.NAME: %results/status%=='200'
MAP.COMMENT: api call is success. No data, do nothing

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve social interaction data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if current social interaction is there

INVOKE.COMMENT: get challenge periods for friend's challengeId

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.NAME: %responseListSize%>0&&%results/status%=='200'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if api call is success and challenge periods exists

MAP.COMMENT: compare current date to challenge periods effective dates

BRANCH.COMMENT: check compared dates to determine current periods

MAP.NAME: %effDateCompFriendsChallengePeriodEffFromDate%='1'&&%effDateCompFriendsChallengePeriodEffToDate%='-1'
MAP.COMMENT: effective date is within the challenge period effective dates

MAP.NAME: %effDateCompFriendsChallengePeriodEffFromDate%='0'||%effDateCompFriendsChallengePeriodEffToDate%='0'
MAP.COMMENT: effective date is on challenge period effective dates
compare current date to tempCutoff date

BRANCH.COMMENT: check compared dates to determine cutoff date

MAP.NAME: %effDateCompCutoffDay%='-1'||%effDateCompCutoffDay%='0'
MAP.COMMENT: effective date is before or equals to cutoff date

MAP.NAME: %effDateCompCutoffDate%='1'
MAP.COMMENT: effective date is after cutoff date

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- VE-1242 Updatedlogic to calculate cutoff date ---

MAP.COMMENT: compare current date to cutoff date

BRANCH.COMMENT: check compared dated to determine cutoff date

MAP.NAME: %effDateCompCutoffDay%='-1'||%effDateCompCutoffDay%='0'
MAP.COMMENT: effective date is before or equals to cutoff date

MAP.NAME: %effDateCompCutoffDay%='1'
MAP.COMMENT: effective date is after cutoff date

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: cutoffDay cannot be determined, throw error

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: current period dosen't exists, do nothing

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve challenge periods data from DB. Error: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: use current date as cutoff date

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: cutoffDate is there, proceed with rest of the logic

INVOKE.COMMENT: get friend's social interaction members details

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

MAP.COMMENT: map friend's social interactions members data
VE-1227 -- update friend's social interactions members data with new effective to date

INVOKE.COMMENT: update friend's social interaction members data with new effective to date

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- VE-1242 Update SI status to SUSPENDED on member removal ---

MAP.COMMENT: compare current date to cutoff date

BRANCH.COMMENT: check friend's social interaction type and social interaction status

SEQUENCE.NAME: %friendsSocialInteractions/socialInteractions/socialInteractionStatus%=='COMPLETE' && %dateCompare%>=0
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: update friend's social interaction, social interaction status should be complete till cutoff date after that the status should be suspended

MAP.COMMENT: update friend's social interactions status to SUSPENDED

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: no need to update social interaction

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to update social interactions members data to DB. Error: %results/message%

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
